title: solanum album var. rumphii
intro: Solanum album var. rumphii, also known as the White Dune Apple or Sea Berry, is a plant species in the Solanaceae family, native to tropical regions and coastal areas. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, to treat a range of health issues including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Solanum album var. rumphii include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help protect against cell damage, reduce inflammation, and prevent infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function, reduce stress, and promote overall well-being.
